name: Vinton Skate & Activity Centervint
description: Vinton Skate & Activity Centervint is a place to play pickleball in Vinton, IA. There are 4 outdoor courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to lights. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Walford City Park
description: Walford City Park is a place to play pickleball in Walford, IA. There is 1 outdoor acrylic court. This is a dedicated court with a permanent net and lines. The court is free. Amenities include restrooms and wheelchair accessibility.

name: Williams Court @ Riverside Park
description: Come play pickleball at Williams Court @ Riverside Park in Vinton, IA! There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights.
